title: VanEck's tokenized VBILL US Treasury fund can now be used as collateral on Euler
message_html: VanEck's tokenized VBILL US Treasury fund can now be used as collateral on Euler ...
snippet: Securitize launched VanEck's VBILL as a collateral asset in an Euler lending market curated by KPK on Thursday.

title: Fidelity Digital Assets highlights 'growing evidence' of shift from dollar-based systems
message_html: Fidelity Digital Assets highlights 'growing evidence' of shift from dollar-based systems ...
snippet: The investment firm said nation-states and central banks are increasingly turning to assets like Bitcoin and gold as alternative settlement systems outside of US control.

title: Aave Labs secures dual UK licenses for regulated crypto payments infrastructure through local subsidiary
message_html: Aave Labs secures dual UK licenses for regulated crypto payments infrastructure through local subsidiary ...
snippet: Aave Labs has obtained FCA cryptoasset registration in the U.K. for its Push subsidiaries, unlocking zero-fee fiat on-ramps.

title: Gemini crypto exchange launches AI data feed powered by Grok
message_html: Gemini crypto exchange launches AI data feed powered by Grok ...
snippet: The move comes as Gemini continues to expand beyond spot crypto trading into derivatives, predictions, and other financial services.

title: NYSE parent ICE pushes 'level playing field' for 24/7 onchain perps
message_html: NYSE parent ICE pushes 'level playing field' for 24/7 onchain perps ...
snippet: ICE’s CEO said regulators need to create a “level playing field” for launching 24/7 onchain perps contracts, which are already trading on exchanges such as Hyperliquid.

title: P2P.org launches real-time data stream for Sui and Hyperliquid
message_html: P2P.org launches real-time data stream for Sui and Hyperliquid ...
snippet: P2P.org, a blockchain infrastructure provider operating validators across 40+ proof-of-stake networks since 2018, today launched Syncro Data Stream, a real-time blockchain data stream for Sui and Hyperliquid.
